celestial_netherite.title: Craft a Celestial Netherite Ingot (Celestisynth — combines netherite + celestial materials, check JEI for exact recipe)

celestial_sword.title: Craft a Celestial weapon using Celestial Netherite (the highest base damage weapon in this pack)

subtitle.text: Netherite from the deep earth. Celestial material from beyond the sky. One ingot.

description: Celestial Netherite is the synthesis of:
- Netherite: mined from Ancient Debris in the Nether (Ch10)
- Celestial material: gathered from the End (Ch13-16)
Two dimensions. Two extremes of the game's physical limits.
The recipe is in JEI — check Celestisynth mod recipes.
It likely requires a specialized crafting station from Celestisynth.
The station itself may require celestial materials to build.
Follow the JEI tree from Celestial Dust upward.
The sword is the starting point.
Craft the sword first — it is the fastest and confirms the recipe chain.
